questions.question: A fair six-sided die is rolled. What is the probability distribution of the outcome?
questions.hint: List the possible outcomes and their probabilities.

questions.question: A coin is flipped three times. What is the probability that exactly two of the outcomes are 'heads'?
A random variable X has a discrete probability distribution with the following probabilities: P(X=1) = 0.2, P(X=2) = 0.3, P(X=3) = 0.5. What is the expected value of X?
questions.hint: Use the formula for the expected value of a discrete random variable.
